_meta.source: appointments -> patient.lead_id -> lead (Screening Calls, offline clinics)
_meta.note: Per clinic/week, bookings traced to channel (utm_source/origin/gclid) and lead age (lead.created_at -> booked). 'joint' = channel->age total counts for the combined flow. 99.95% of booked patients link to a lead. Source of BOOKINGS, not all leads.
